{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201625280E8E98E7DCDD608F1126"}"},"total":4877},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7395040212190987033","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"节奏把控的很棒，不要拘泥于正史，大多数人看不懂，把野史苟史也用一用就有意思了，可以当个噱头，另外给推荐几个，应梦贤臣薛仁贵六边形战士，打异族加成卫青，霍去病，冉闵，马超，兵种的话晚一点再上大明神机营这种火器，我想早点看大秦弩阵，加点奇人异士把鲁班墨子搞来，让大秦的箭雨早点灌在小日子头上，遮天蔽日那种，那吕布不行就不要了，给射成刺猬得了，搞个转换山盟海誓令把项羽虞姬换出来","text_exts":[{"e":78,"s":75,"text":"霍去病","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%9C%8D%E5%8E%BB%E7%97%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773995128608F1126%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227395040212190987033%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227350191363196996670%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%9C%8D%E5%8E%BB%E7%97%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721795298,"group_id":"7350191363196996670","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6K21m0O9twmDPkZJKC5b9QKsWVRndRTr9rnzcV6t+sC","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1306670227795195","user_name":"喜欢冬瓜籽的谢恩"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1306670227795195","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7350191363196996670","book_info":{"abstract":"（历史+国战+名将+直播+国运+权谋+热血）
历史国战开启，种花家因历史丢失痛失先机，在战场内沉沦二十年底蕴尽失。
穿越而来的李晨莫名被选为第十六位参赛选手，背负种花家之名入战场求一线生机。
看着虚拟战场内满目疮痍的世界，李晨毅然张开双手。
朝着游戏内所有联盟发出了属于种花家的怒吼！
“苍天已死！”
“黄天当立！”
“岁在甲子！”
“天下大吉！”
（一本糅合了历史上诸多王朝的争霸小说，以叛军势力开局，谋取天下之巅）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a2992f9154a41a78e47cec0b04786a4","author":"咸鱼丶不翻身","author_id":"","book_id":"7350191363196996670","book_name":"全球国战：贫道张角请诸位赴死！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7350191413528642110","read_count":"77605","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1597773"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"761","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,直播,开局,国运","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/64b682733a532d9cfc2be1674234c992~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779179128&x-signature=l%2BM68kD2ms7WcTFHC1oEXDR7Xuc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"646990592741550","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"203"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201625280E8E98E7DCDD608F1126"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":37,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":22351,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":54172},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7429285006592885528","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书的笔法和剧情几乎完美，是我看到的拥有历史元素的作品当中，手法最灵性的一本。但是作者大大，剧情推进的略微慢了一点，更新也没有太快，所以我决定养一养再看。背景设定别出心裁，我没想到真的有人可以写成，甚至还写的很不错。一个前所未有的黑暗世界观，本应该非常的压抑，绝望，但是作者大大通过各种各样的方式来增添色彩，比如增加打脸的情节，还有猪脚的一些骚话，完美化解了上述的问题。总之，作者加油，五星奉上。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1729769418,"group_id":"7350191363196996670","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"现实生活非常充实的人，俗称现充。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7/qlUI99QRDi4N2mWUN2Oo=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/649665cc4c764d3c9674c422a2573f46~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776530302&x-signature=W72Nt7NDasmYPAADJmTocO65nM0%3D","user_id":"928458564189422","user_name":"纹观"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"928458564189422","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7350191363196996670","book_info":{"abstract":"（历史+国战+名将+直播+国运+权谋+热血）
